description: Slack MCP server: channels, messages, threads, reactions, users, files, and scheduled messages
name: io.github.mindstone/mcp-server-slack

environmentVariables.description: Path to the host-managed Slack config directory
environmentVariables.name: SLACK_CONFIG_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Slack workspace team ID (one process per workspace)
environmentVariables.name: SLACK_TEAM_ID

environmentVariables.description: Slack OAuth Connected App client ID
environmentVariables.name: SLACK_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Slack OAuth Connected App client secret
environmentVariables.name: SLACK_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to disable token refresh on this surface (cloud surface)
environmentVariables.name: SLACK_DISABLE_REFRESH

environmentVariables.description: WebClient retries on transient failures (0-20). Lower this on cloud to avoid stacking long retry budgets into multi-minute hangs.
environmentVariables.name: SLACK_MAX_RETRIES

title: Slack
